title: Screenshot capture & history (user request 2026-06-12, preempts remaining phase-2 tasks)
goal: Photonz becomes the screenshot tool: ‚åò‚áß4 grabs a rectangle, ‚åò‚áß3 captures the full screen, ‚åò‚áßH toggles a history carousel (copy / edit per capture).
constraints: macOS intercepts ‚åò‚áß3/‚åò‚áß4 system-wide while the system Screenshots shortcuts are enabled; Photonz registers Carbon global hotkeys that take over once the user disables the system ones (Settings ‚Üí Keyboard ‚Üí Keyboard Shortcuts ‚Üí Screenshots). The Capture menu carries the same shortcuts for discoverability.
Screen capture needs the Screen Recording permission (TCC); CaptureCenter prompts and the history panel shows a hint with a deep link to Privacy settings.

tasks.title: CaptureHistory core model (ordering, cap, pruning) ‚Äî TDD
tasks.notes: PhotonzCore/CaptureHistory.swift: CaptureEntry (id/createdAt/fileName) + CaptureHistory (newest-first, limit 50, add returns pruned entries, remove returns the entry so callers delete files). 6 tests.

tasks.title: ScreenCapturer: SCScreenshotManager full-screen + rect capture, permission flow
tasks.notes: Capture/ScreenCapturer.swift. sourceRect is screen-local top-left points (matches flipped overlay view coords). captureAllScreens = one image per display (system ‚åò‚áß3 behavior). Permission via CGPreflight/CGRequestScreenCaptureAccess.

tasks.title: Rect-selection overlay window (crosshair drag, Esc cancels)
tasks.notes: Capture/RectSelection.swift: borderless .screenSaver-level window per screen (canBecomeKey override for Esc), flipped view dims 25% and punches out the drag rect. Overlay dismissed + 60ms sleep before sampling so it's gone from the window server.

tasks.title: Global hotkeys ‚åò‚áß3/‚åò‚áß4/‚åò‚áßH (Carbon RegisterEventHotKey) + menu equivalents
tasks.notes: Capture/HotkeyCenter.swift (C-callback trampoline, MainActor.assumeIsolated ‚Äî Carbon app-target events arrive on main). All three registrations verified status==noErr on this machine. Capture menu in PhotonzApp mirrors the shortcuts.

tasks.title: CaptureStore: persist PNGs to Application Support, load on launch
tasks.notes: Capture/CaptureStore.swift: PNGs + index.json in ~/Library/Application Support/Photonz/Captures (directory injectable for tests). Verified headlessly: add/reload/remove/pasteboard round-trip all green.

tasks.title: History carousel panel (‚åò‚áßH): thumbnails with copy + edit actions
tasks.notes: HistoryPanel.swift: glass panel slides from top of EditorView, LazyHStack carousel, copy (doc.on.doc) + edit (pencil) under each thumbnail; edit opens via AppState.openCapture. Hosts the Screen Recording permission hint.

verification_pending: End-to-end capture needs the user to grant Screen Recording to Photonz.app (system prompts on first use) and, for global ‚åò‚áß3/‚åò‚áß4, to disable the system Screenshots shortcuts. Everything testable without TCC permission is verified.
